items.label: delicata squash
items.name: squash_delicata
items.note: bake at 350F for 50min; can eat skin!

items.label: kabocha squash
items.name: squash_kabocha
items.note: bake at 400F for 30-35min; can eat skin!; avg weight research: 1349g, 800g

items.label: spaghetti squash
items.name: squash_spaghetti
items.note: bake at 400F for 30-60min, til tender and fluff; avg weight research: 1082g (had 89g of skin)

items.label: asian sweet potato
items.name: sweet_potato_asian
items.note: 45-55 min at 430F on baking pan. Turn halfway.

items.label: beef short rib
